summary: Iteration 19: OG Image Refactor Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests pass. Verified removal of custom Pillow-rendered OG template and replacement with auction's headline image directly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/share/auction/{id} correctly returns og:image pointing to headline image (https://mobistatic4.focus.bg/...)
og:image:width, og:image:height, og:image:type=image/png meta tags correctly REMOVED from share HTML
GET /api/og/auction/{id}.png correctly returns 302 redirect to headline image for backwards compatibility
POST /api/admin/auctions/{id}/regenerate-og-image works and returns headline URL
seo.py only uses og_image.headline_image_url() - NOT build_and_persist or build_or_cache
build_and_persist simplified to just return headline_image_url() without Pillow composition
No import errors or app crash - healthz/readyz endpoints return 200
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 validated the OG image refactor. Key changes: (1) GET /api/share/auction/{id} now uses og_image.headline_image_url() directly for og:image and twitter:image meta tags - no more Pillow-generated PNG. (2) GET /api/og/auction/{id}.png is now a 302 redirect to headline image for backwards compat. (3) og:image:width/height/type=image/png meta tags removed since headline images can be JPG/WebP of various dimensions. (4) build_and_persist() simplified to just return headline URL without any Pillow composition or filesystem writes. (5) Fallback chain: headline → auction.og_image_url → '/og-default.jpg'. Live auction tested: 5a476c7a-4a21-4550-b591-439d8fae2f94 with headline at https://mobistatic4.focus.bg/mobile/photosorg/034/1/11774653575320034_hr.webp

share_route_og_image.details: og:image points to headline image URL, NOT /api/og/auction/{id}.png or /uploads/og/ path

share_route_twitter_image.details: twitter:image also points to headline image URL

og_image_dimension_tags_removed.details: og:image:width, og:image:height, og:image:type=image/png meta tags NOT present in share HTML

og_png_route_redirect.details: GET /api/og/auction/{id}.png returns 302 redirect to headline image

admin_regenerate_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/auctions/{id}/regenerate-og-image works and returns headline URL

no_pillow_composition.details: seo.py only uses og_image.headline_image_url() - build_or_cache/_compose_image not called

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real endpoints
